title: Receipt
description: Cryptographically signed receipt proving a completed service session transaction

data.description: Base64-encoded OSPP Canonical Form (spec/06-security.md §4.8) of the canonical ReceiptData body — see receipt-data.schema.json (11 required fields plus meterValues when present; up to 12 signed fields). Signed by the station's ECDSA P-256 private key over the canonical bytes directly (per 06-security.md §6.2 v0.4.2; NOT over the base64 form).

signatureAlgorithm.description: Signature algorithm used to sign the receipt
